languages.text: "Недалеко, за центральной платформой, есть узел управления. Через него некроны помещают жертв в оковы и преобразуют их. Я сумел разглядеть, что сфера слева сверху управляет подачей энергии к установке — и что переключатель крайнего правого ряда запускает превращение".
languages.translation_comment: "Я видел, какая судьба постигла моих братьев, угодивших на этот стол. Видишь вон то ксеноустройство? Это какой-то когитатор. Через него ксеносы как-то управляют и оковами на столе, и самим устройством".

"Я видел, какая судьба постигла моих братьев, угодивших на этот стол. Видишь вон то ксеноустройство? Это какой-то когитатор. Через него ксеносы как-то управляют и оковами на столе, и самим устройством".

languages.text: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."
languages.original_text: "Недалеко, за центральной платформой, есть узел управления. Через него некроны помещают жертв в оковы и преобразуют их. Я сумел разглядеть, что сфера слева сверху управляет подачей энергии к установке — и что переключатель крайнего правого ряда запускает превращение".

traits.locale_text: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

"There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

"I have seen what fate has befallen the other victims of this device. There is a cogitator not far behind the central platform. Through it, the xenos tech-sorcerer placed the unfortunates in shackles and controlled their transformation. I could only make out that the crystal on the upper left controls the blessed spark to the machine, and that the button on the far right triggers the transformation."

"There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

"There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

languages.text: 「この装置の犠牲者たちは、運命に翻弄された。中央プラットフォームの少し後ろに、思考装置がある。そこを通り、異種族の技術者である彼は、不幸な人たちを鎖で縛り、変容を操った。私は、左上にある水晶が機械に祝福された火花を供給し、右端のボタンが変容を誘発することを解明した」
languages.original_text: "I have seen what fate has befallen the other victims of this device. There is a cogitator not far behind the central platform. Through it, the xenos tech-sorcerer placed the unfortunates in shackles and controlled their transformation. I could only make out that the crystal on the upper left controls the blessed spark to the machine, and that the button on the far right triggers the transformation."

traits.locale_text: 「この装置の犠牲者たちは、運命に翻弄された。中央プラットフォームの少し後ろに、思考装置がある。そこを通り、異種族の技術者である彼は、不幸な人たちを鎖で縛り、変容を操った。私は、左上にある水晶が機械に祝福された火花を供給し、右端のボタンが変容を誘発することを解明した。」

languages.text: «Hay un nodo de control cerca de la plataforma central. Mediante él, los Necrones atan a sus víctimas y las transforman. He podido ver que el orbe de la esquina superior izquierda controla el flujo de energía y el interruptor de la derecha activa la transformación».
languages.original_text: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

traits.locale_text: «Hay un nodo de control cerca de la plataforma central. Mediante él, los Necrones atan a sus víctimas y las transforman. He podido ver que el orbe de la esquina superior izquierda controla el flujo de energía y el interruptor de la derecha activa la transformación».

languages.text: “在中央平台后方的不远处，有一处控制节点。太空死灵正是通过它给受害者套上枷锁，并对他们进行转化。我可以看到，左上方那个球体负责控制能量供给，而最右侧那个开关则会启动转化程序。”
languages.original_text: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

traits.locale_text: “在中央平台后方的不远处，有一处控制节点。太空死灵正是通过它给受害者套上枷锁，并对他们进行转化。我可以看到，左上方那个球体负责控制能量供给，而最右侧那个开关则会启动转化程序。”

languages.text: "Nicht weit hinter der zentralen Plattform gibt es einen Kontrollknoten. Über ihn legen die Necrons ihre Opfer in Ketten und transformieren sie. Ich konnte sehen, dass die Kugel oben links die Energieversorgung steuert und der Schalter auf der rechten Seite die Transformation auslöst."
languages.original_text: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

traits.locale_text: "Nicht weit hinter der zentralen Plattform gibt es einen Kontrollknoten. Über ihn legen die Necrons ihre Opfer in Ketten und transformieren sie. Ich konnte sehen, dass die Kugel oben links die Energieversorgung steuert und der Schalter auf der rechten Seite die Transformation auslöst."

languages.text: "Merkezî platformun hemen arkasında bir kontrol nodülü var. Nekronlar, kurbanlarını bu nodül aracılığıyla prangalara vuruyor ve dönüştürüyor. Sol üstteki kürenin enerji akışını kontrol ettiğini, en sağdaki düğmenin dönüşümü başlattığını görebiliyordum."
languages.original_text: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

traits.locale_text: "Merkezî platformun hemen arkasında bir kontrol nodülü var. Nekronlar, kurbanlarını bu nodül aracılığıyla prangalara vuruyor ve dönüştürüyor. Sol üstteki kürenin enerji akışını kontrol ettiğini, en sağdaki düğmenin dönüşümü başlattığını görebiliyordum."

languages.text: « Un nœud de commande se trouve un peu en retrait de la plateforme centrale. Les Nécrons y placent leurs victimes enchaînées avant de les transformer. De ce que j'ai vu, l'orbe en haut à gauche contrôle l'alimentation en énergie, tandis que le bouton tout à droite déclenche la transformation. »
languages.original_text: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."

traits.locale_text: « Un nœud de commande se trouve un peu en retrait de la plateforme centrale. Les Nécrons y placent leurs victimes enchaînées avant de les transformer. De ce que j'ai vu, l'orbe en haut à gauche contrôle l'alimentation en énergie, tandis que le bouton tout à droite déclenche la transformation. »
